text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our day off, and I'm accompanying Manhattan
Cafe to the antique cafe she often visits.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What should I get today... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I just saw a coffee blend that takes
me back a little...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to try some with me? It tastes
good, I assure you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll go ahead and order it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This aroma... Lend your ear to the music... and
free your mind of any thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coupled with the comforting atmosphere, the
fragrant coffee puts me completely at ease...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I relax, I come to hear a strange melody
playing. I open my eyes to find...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you've found your way here too?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure... I drank some of that coffee, closed
my eyes, and the next thing I knew I was here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk around in search of an exit, but can't
find anything that looks like a way out. In that
case...
choice_data_list: Since we're here, why don't we have some fun?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was thinking the same thing... This is an amusement park, after all...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So, where should we go?
choice_data_list: Let's go into the haunted house.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A haunted house... within an illusion? Hehe, we
should probably proceed with caution...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This illusion is very polished... It's so atmospheric.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's a little too polished... I start to feel a chill running down my spine and—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I'm overwhelmed by the sensation of
falling into a bottomless pit! I throw my hands up
in a desperate panic!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I've got you! This way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe yanks me up, and I finally find
my footing again.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think we'd better watch where we step here...
Follow me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tap, tap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Manhattan Cafe leads the way, glittering light
trails her every step. I follow after her, guided by
her light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scene feels straight out of a dream. Maybe
it's because of the terrifying experience I just had,
but it feels like each speck of light shines brighter
as if to balance things out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling more comfortable, I grow a little sleepy...
And when I open my eyes again...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I like the sound of that... I wonder what we'll be
able to see from the top...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk over to the empty ferris wheel and climb
into a carriage. It lurches and sways as it makes
the ascent, and just as we reach the top...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a loud noise! I have no idea what's going
on, but I've got to keep Manhattan Cafe safe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...It's all right. Look up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Fireworks... They're so colorful...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It must have been the fireworks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fireworks explode, scattering their
shimmering sparks. As I watch them, I feel my
heart growing calm.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you for protecting me earlier...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was happy... that you tried to keep me safe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's somehow rewarding to hear Manhattan Cafe
express her gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling more comfortable, I grow a little sleepy...
And when I open my eyes again...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Welcome back. I just got here myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It must have been the taste of the coffee. It
caused our senses to resonate and whisked us off
to that illusion...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And the source of the illusion was my own
memories... I used to drink this coffee all the time
with my parents.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Tasting it again brought back the joy I felt in my
childhood...
choice_data_list: I had a lot of fun too.
I had a lot of fun too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'm glad to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You see, it's very... very rare for two people to experience the same illusion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk home, and though it doesn't seem
Manhattan Cafe notices, her shadow sways as if it
were dancing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's actually quite happy to have shared
an experience with someone.
